brand_identity.name: Verityn
brand_identity.description: A premium, dark-mode-first news aggregator that distills chaos into clarity.
brand_identity.mission: Truth in motion. News without the noise.

design_principles: Mobile-First Cinematography: Every scroll feels like a camera pan.
Dark Mode Native: Light is used only to guide attention, never to flood the screen.
Type as Texture: Headlines are the primary visual element.
Fluid Context: Transitions between feed and story are seamless (Shared Element style).

container.mobile: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-zinc-950 overflow-hidden shadow-2xl relative
container.desktop_wrapper: w-full min-h-screen bg-black flex justify-center items-center p-0 md:p-8

BottomNav.styles: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/5 h-16 flex items-center justify-around max-w-md mx-auto w-full pb-safe

StoryCard.description: Immersive card with background image and text overlay.

styles.container: relative w-full aspect-[4/5] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-lg group isolate
styles.image: absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-105
styles.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-zinc-950 via-zinc-950/50 to-transparent
styles.content: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-6 z-10 flex flex-col gap-2

Timeline.description: Vertical line with nodes connecting events.

styles.container: relative pl-8 border-l border-zinc-800 ml-4 space-y-8
styles.node: absolute -left-[5px] top-2 w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-blue-500 ring-4 ring-zinc-950

styles.item: px-6 py-3 rounded-full border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/50 text-zinc-300 transition-all cursor-pointer

SummaryCard.styles: bg-zinc-900/80 p-6 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md my-6 relative overflow-hidden
SummaryCard.badge: absolute top-4 right-4 text-[10px] font-bold bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 px-2 py-1 rounded border border-blue-500/20

gestures: Swipe left/right on feed to change stories
Tap right edge to advance timeline

animations.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENTATION: Build this as a Mobile Web App. Wrap the entire app in a 'max-w-md mx-auto' container on desktop to simulate the phone experience.
2. THEME: Force the 'dark' class on the HTML element. Do not implement a light mode toggle.
3. FONTS: Import Playfair Display and Inter from Google Fonts in the index.css file.
4. NAVIGATION: Implement the BottomNav component to appear on all pages except the 'Onboarding' and 'Splash' screens.
5. DATA: Mock the news data. Ensure the mocked data has 'category', 'summary', 'timeline_events' (array), and 'source_url' fields.
6. DETAILS: The Story Detail page should use the 'General' image as a hero background, with the content scrolling over it.
7. UI POLISH: Use 'backdrop-filter: blur()' heavily for that premium glass feel.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.image_handling: Always add object-cover and w-full h-full to images to prevent distortion.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.accessibility: Ensure all text has adequate contrast against the dark background. Use aria-labels for icon-only buttons.
